sections.markdown:
- Activity: Sun Fun Run #3
- Started: 2025-06-08 10:11
- Distance: 15 km
- Moving time: 1:23:11
- Elapsed time: 1:23:26
- Elevation gain: 107 m
- Average heart rate: 166.2 bpm
- Max heart rate: 178 bpm
- Average watts: 207.5 W
- Average speed: 10.9 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `5` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `166.7 bpm`, ranging from `152.5` to `175.3 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `161.8 bpm` and second-half average HR was `174.1 bpm` (+12.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `172.3 spm`, with a working range of `127.0` to `179.0 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `170.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `172.8 spm` (+2.2 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:32 /km` across `15.044 km` in `1:23:11` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:37 /km` and second-half pace was `5:26 /km` (-12 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `166.2 bpm` average and `178 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `160.3 bpm` in the first half and `172.6 bpm` in the second (+12.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:23:11` out of `1:23:26` elapsed (99.7%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `3` stop segments and `0.3%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `151.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.2 m` and `18.2 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `92.4 m` in the first half and `58.8 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
